title: HealthRateRBInfo Function
description:
This command calculates the parts consumption rate based on the actual operating condition.

HealthRateRBInfo Function Example

The example below outputs the alarm when the consumption rate of the Joint #3 reduction gear unit on the robot 1 reaches 90%.

Function AlarmCheck
 Real HealthRate
 HealthRate = HealthRateRBInfo(1,HEALTH_ROBOT_TYPE_GEAR,3)
 If HealthRate > 90 Then

   Print "Alarm ON"
 EndIf

Fend

See Also: HealthRateRBInfo Function

HealthRBAlarmOn

HealthRBInfo
see_also: Returns the consumption rate for the specified robot parts.
examples:
Function AlarmCheck Real HealthRate HealthRate = HealthRateRBInfo(1,HEALTH_ROBOT_TYPE_GEAR,3) If HealthRate > 90 Then
   Print "Alarm ON" EndIf
Fend
